candidates.title: The Thoughts of the Emperor Marcus Aurelius Antoninus
candidates.quality_notes: Most widely-used modern English translation. Clear, readable, philosophically accurate. Standard Ebooks provides clean, well-formatted text with consistent structure. Book 1 divided into numbered sections matching Greek structure.
candidates.confidence_notes: High quality: Standard translation for study, well-maintained modern edition, clear structure, known to align well with Greek text
candidates.structural_usefulness: excellent - numbered sections align with Greek
candidates.alignment_fitness: excellent - designed for study alongside Greek, verse-by-verse structure
candidates.ranking_rationale: Primary witness: most scholarly and widely-used translation, excellent alignment potential, clean modern edition

candidates.title: The Meditations of the Emperor Marcus Aurelius Antoninus
candidates.extraction_method: Plain text parsing with section markers
candidates.quality_notes: First English translation, archaic style but historically important. Uses older English that may be harder for modern readers. Structure is preserved with numbered sections.
candidates.confidence_notes: Medium quality: Historical significance, archaic language, less precise than modern translations, but structurally sound
candidates.structural_usefulness: good - has numbered sections but archaic formatting
candidates.alignment_fitness: fair - archaic style may complicate word-level alignment
candidates.ranking_rationale: Secondary witness: historical value, different translation approach, useful for comparison but not primary alignment target

candidates.title: The Meditations of the Emperor Marcus Aurelius Antoninus
candidates.quality_notes: Based on Foulis translation of 1742, scholarly re-rendering. Less widely used than Long but represents different translation tradition.
candidates.confidence_notes: Medium quality: Scholarly but less established, intermediate between archaic and modern styles
candidates.structural_usefulness: good - structured but may need normalization
candidates.alignment_fitness: fair - less commonly used, structure may vary from Greek
candidates.ranking_rationale: Tertiary resource: available for comparison but not primary alignment target, Long translation preferred
